positive: A stylized celestial fox (kitsune) in a meditating, symmetrical posture, rendered in a minimalist yet intricate neo-art style. The design must be composed of clean, strong black silhouettes and negative space, interspersed with geometric cosmic elements like stylized stars, crescent moons, and flowing nebula patterns. The overall composition should form a highly detailed, central mandala structure, optimized for apparel printing. Use a strong contrast palette of deep navy blue and vibrant gold accents against a white background. Vector illustration quality, linework, high detail, sacred geometry, mystical, symmetrical composition, sticker design aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blurry, noise, grainy, watermark, text, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, artifacts, dirty, excessive color gradient, logo, trademark, copyright, extra limbs, deformed, NSFW
